description: The default AI-generated SaaS landing page: default Tailwind blue CTA, stock-photo hero, 3-column features below. Ships from bolt / v0 / lovable on every 'build me a landing page' prompt with no style direction.
avoid_reasoning: Indistinguishable from 40+ other SaaS landing pages generated the same week. Reads as zero-taste default output. Specifically: #3B82F6 primary, #F3F4F6 background, Inter sole typeface, `grid-cols-3` features section.
